subject: fix(quality): address code audit findings across codebase
body:
Implements all items from the code quality audit:

- Fix timer leak in DebugPill.tsx (ref+cleanup pattern for copy feedback)
- Replace `as unknown as Record` double-casts with typed Navigator
  interface in browser.d.ts (usePWAInstall, DebugPill)
- Add `declare module 'virtual:pwa-register/react'` to eliminate
  @ts-expect-error in usePWAUpdate
- Standardize error state across all data hooks (usePdfVerifications,
  useNotifications, useSignatureLog now expose `error` like other hooks)
- Add try/catch to ProjectDetailPage.saveEdit() and
  ModuleEditor.handleSave() with user-facing error feedback
- Split AgreementDetailPage (405 lines) into AgreementHeader,
  AgreementModulesSection, and AgreementNotesSection sub-components
- Consolidate 6 modal boolean states into single discriminated
  `ActiveModal` union type, preventing impossible states

Tags: cleanup, refactor, error-handling, types, components
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: code-quality
Semver: minor
